entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental change threatening global food security and crop productivity

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and growth process of agricultural crops

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION AND ADAPTATION TARGETS
entities.description: Goals set by countries to reduce climate change impacts and adapt to new conditions

entities.name: AGRI-FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The entire range of activities involved in the production, processing, and distribution of food

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food, feed, or fiber

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The purposeful manipulation of plant species to create desired genotypes and phenotypes

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to optimize crop growth and yield

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing agricultural yields without adverse environmental impact

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a crop or system to recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: HOLISTIC APPROACH
entities.description: An integrated method combining multiple disciplines and collaborative efforts

entities.name: RESEARCH
entities.description: Systematic investigation into materials and sources to establish facts

entities.name: POLICY
entities.description: Principles or courses of action adopted by a government or organization
